title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's first major goal, the Japanese
Derby, is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite trembling from sheer pressure, Special
Week picks her head up and heads to the starting
gate.
